MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff's motion to advance the current trial date with preference.

APPEARANCES: Jennifer L. Alesio, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 898-1555 for pltf & moving party; Lauren N. Peebles, Esq. of Berry & Berry 510/250-0200 Designated Defense Counsel.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: Plaintiff's motion to advance the current trial date with preference is granted. The trial date is advanced from April 21, 2014 to February 3, 2014 with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). Counsel for Berry & Berry addressed status of authorizations, stating that they did receive them. All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain dictated by the applicable provisions of the C.C.P. No substantive opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (510/451-1580) (503/TLJ)
